# claude-scaffold

> npx CLI that deploys CLAUDE.md, hooks, skills, and agents into any repository in one command. Enforces consistent Claude Code workflow and team coding standards across all projects.

## Docs

- [Quick Start](https://github.com/pyramidheadshark/claude-scaffold/blob/main/README.md): Install and deploy in 2 minutes
- [CLI Reference](https://github.com/pyramidheadshark/claude-scaffold/blob/main/docs/REFERENCE.md): init, update, status, add-skill, org-profiles commands
- [Integration Guide](https://github.com/pyramidheadshark/claude-scaffold/blob/main/docs/INTEGRATION.md): Step-by-step setup for existing repos
- [Architecture](https://github.com/pyramidheadshark/claude-scaffold/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): How skill auto-loading, hooks lifecycle, and session caching work

## Session Safety (v1.4.0)

Every Bash command Claude runs is classified as CRITICAL, MODERATE, or SAFE. On CRITICAL operations (git reset --hard, rm -rf, DROP TABLE, curl | bash), a git tag recovery point is created automatically before the command runs. Multiple CRITICAL commands per session produce multiple tags: claude/s-{session8}, claude/s-{session8}-2, etc. The notification with the tag and restore command (git reset --hard <tag>) is injected at the top of the next prompt. All tool calls are logged to JSONL audit files in .claude/logs/sessions/. View logs with: npx claude-scaffold session-logs --list, --tail N, or --session <id>.

## Optional

- [Changelog](https://github.com/pyramidheadshark/claude-scaffold/blob/main/docs/CHANGELOG.md): Release history
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/claude-scaffold): Install via npm/npx
